<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Shared\ValidationRulesFinders; use PhpParser\Node; /** * This class looks for * $anyVariable = $request->validate(...); * or just * $request->validate(...); * * Also supports `$req` instead of `$request` * Also supports `->validateWithBag('', ...)` */ class RequestValidate { public static function find(Node $node) { if (!($node instanceof Node\Stmt\Expression)) return; $expr = $node->expr; if ($expr instanceof Node\Expr\Assign) { $expr = $expr->expr; // If it's an assignment, get the expression on the RHS } if ( $expr instanceof Node\Expr\MethodCall && $expr->var instanceof Node\Expr\Variable && in_array($expr->var->name, ["request", "req"]) ) { if ($expr->name->name == "validate") { return $expr->args[0]->value; } if ($expr->name->name == "validateWithBag") { return $expr->args[1]->value; } } } }
